query: SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('streaming_status', 'music_tracks') AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%creat%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute SELECT TABLE_NAME, COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME IN ('streaming_status', 'music_tracks') AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%creat%' ORDER BY TABLE_NAME
